title: Analytics - Events are gathered if user is logged out but opted into data-sharing
scenario: Firebase events are gathered for logged-out users who have opted into data-sharing
steps: Precondition: User is not logged in but has opted into data-sharing via App Settings > General > Account > Share Data toggle.
Trigger any Firebase event (e.g., device_added which gathers the device's serial number).
Verify on Firebase that the event count for that device's serial number increases.
expected: Events are gathered even when the user is logged out but has opted into data-sharing. The event count for the device's serial number should increase on Firebase.
